专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are socially popular/highly recommended. The university offers a relatively large number of these majors, which has some appeal for applicants. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Province general college entrance examination is approximately 451,000. Based on the 2025 physics category proportion of 69.4%, the estimated number of physics category candidates is about 313,000, a decrease of about 2.4% from 320,779 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition. Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, far from Anhui Province, requiring cross-province study. The proportion of the university's enrollment in Anhui Province relative to its total national enrollment is about 2%-4% (approximately 2.2% in 2024, 2.8% in 2025). Anhui is not its main source province, and regional preference is average.

The contraction will push the admission ranking upward (ranking number decreases), intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a national '211 Project' key construction university, selected as a 'Double First-Class' construction university, located in Xining City, Qinghai Province. As the only 211 university and comprehensive university in Qinghai Province, its medical school has a certain influence in the northwest region, with clinical medicine and other majors enjoying a high reputation. The university's level attracts Anhui candidates mainly through its 211 and Double First-Class labels, but its remote geographical location is an important factor affecting candidates' willingness to apply.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have maintained high application popularity nationwide in recent years, with core medical majors such as clinical medicine and anesthesiology being particularly competitive. Qinghai University's medical category has a small enrollment scale in Anhui Province (only 12 in 2026), making it a scarce enrollment plan, which to some extent increases competition. However, the university is located in the northwest, far from Anhui, and some candidates may give up applying due to geographical factors, creating a certain 'geographical discount' effect. The contraction of 3 places in 2026 will further intensify competition, and the ranking is expected to rise.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical ranking trend analysis, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's medical category in Anhui Province in 2026 is approximately 54170, with a fluctuation range of 53670-54670. The 20% contraction in 2026 is the core factor driving the ranking upward. Meanwhile, against the backdrop of sustained high popularity of medical majors, the admission difficulty is expected to increase compared to 2025.
